author: maxine-at-forecast--noether
content: Delivered: Knowledge page 'signing-trust-design' written with full analysis of GH #106 (agent key isolation) and #107 (allowed_signers trust model). Key recommendations: (1) Container isolation is the right answer for #106, current permissions adequate for non-containerized, (2) Rename allowed_signers → known_signers for #107, (3) Add valid-after timestamps for lifecycle, (4) Don't build crypto-on-crypto integrity protection.
